name: Bechamel Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a warm saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Remove from heat and whisk in the corn starch until well blended.
3. Return to heat and slowly whisk in 2 cups of milk (one at a time), continuing to whisk until the sauce thickens.
4. Remove from heat and whisk in the Parmesan cheese. Fold in one whipped egg.
